svg.text: Unit Status is a status management module for managing additional functions and attributes of Entities
during Stage runtime. Entities can be applied with Unit Statuses, each with a defined Applier Entity.
- Entities dynamically hold multiple statuses. Each status has Runtime Duration, Additional Effects, Additional Node Graph.
- Each active status has independent Stack Layers. Some functions scale with stack count.
- Status ends when Runtime Duration expires or all Stack Layers are depleted. Must be predefined at editing time.
All Additional Effects come from the predefined Effect Pool (e.g., "Mount Looping Effects", "Motion Speed Change").
Each effect applies to one or several of "Characters", "Creations", or "Objects". If a target
entity cannot hold an effect type, it fails to acquire the status. E.g., "Mount Screen Effect" only on Characters.
Multiple effects of same type can apply, but final effect is capped. E.g., Motion Speed Change
limited to -40% to +40%. Some effects are mutually exclusive (e.g., only one Elemental Effect; last takes precedence).
Each Unit Status can be related with a server Node Graph. When Entity holds status, Node Graph is added to Entity;
removed when status ends. Related Node Graph can only come from a Status Node Graph (Composite Nodes allowed).
If multiple statuses relate the same Node Graph, it is related only once; lost only when all related statuses end.
Combat Preset > Unit Status bar > Create Tabs > Create Statuses
Name must be globally unique. Auto-generated Config ID.
Copy button for quick Config ID copy. Custom icon available.
New stacks add to existing, capped at Maximum Stack Layers.
Overlapping Data Update: replaces earliest stack data or discards.
Infinite Duration: prevents removal on expiry; updates no longer affect Initial Runtime Duration.
Each stack calculates duration independently. Stack expires individually.
Max Stack Layers: 10 in this mode.
All stacks removed together on expiry. Each new stack may extend
Time Remaining by Extended Duration. Maximum Extended Duration Limit caps the extended time. Max Stacks: 1000.
Related Node Graph: Status Node Graph related with Entity while it holds the status.
Same Applier cannot apply two same-name statuses; instead adds to existing status.
Can enable Record Latest Applier after stacking.
Set Coexistence Limit. When reached, Same Name Status Update Strategy:
- Cannot Update: application fails | - Minimum Time Remaining: remove shortest remaining, apply new
- Earliest Update Time: remove earliest updated, apply new | - Earliest Application Time: remove oldest, apply new
Records most recent update time for each status instance.
Yielding Status List: if target holds any listed status, application immediately fails. Replacement Status List: if target holds
Preset status in Unit Status Component applied by
Stage Entity on creation. Configurable stack layers.
Add/remove statuses in Local Projectile's Ability Unit.
On hit, add/remove statuses on Target.
Failed: Unexpected error | Failed: Paused for another process (Yielding List)
Failed: Max coexistence reached | Failed: Unable to add stack | Success: New applied | Success: Slot stacking
Pass dynamic override tags. If dictionary key matches override tag, config value is replaced.
Dynamic modifications cannot coexist with original version; only one can be set.
All Coexisting Same Name | Status With Fastest Stack Loss | (Not available) Statuses applied by self
Triggered when target gains new status or existing is updated.
Removal reasons: Replaced | Duration exceeded | Dispelled | Status expired | Class changed
Search whether Target Entity in scene already holds a given Unit Status.
If multiple coexisting statuses removed, same number of Events received. Skill Node Graphs also support add/remove.
Final Value = (Base Value + Change Value) * (1 + Adjustment Rate) * Multiplier + Correction Value
Change Value = base change | Adjustment Rate = scaling coefficient | Multiplier = overall scaling | Correction Value = final increment
Multiplier for interrupt value when attacked. 0 = invincibility (dominant body).
Affects fall acceleration. Default 200%; -200% ignores gravity.
Affects fall damage. -100 = no fall damage.
Affects entity's Max HP via adjustment rate or correction value.
Affects movement speed of characters and creations.
Adjusts stamina consumption. -100% removes stamina cost.
Affects entity's DEF via adjustment rate or correction value.
Affects entity's ATK via adjustment rate or correction value.
Affects attacker's CRIT Rate when this entity is hit.
Recovery: healing applied by entity. Healing: healing received by entity.
Affects elemental damage dealt (Physical + seven elements).
Affects elemental damage received (Physical + seven elements).
Swirl, Superconduct, Electro-Charged, Firestarter, Frozen, Overloaded,
Percentage and flat amount of DEF ignored when dealing DMG.
Higher value = faster skill cooldown reduction.
Affects knockback force magnitude when attacked.
Modifier applied when gaining Aggro Value.
Modifies shield amount by adjustment rate when gaining Shield.
Cannot take damage; being hit does not trigger [When Attacked] event.
Auto-locking attacks and skills cannot lock onto this entity.
HP cannot decrease; being hit still triggers [When Attacked].
Cannot act. Players escape by rapidly tapping Struggle key. Not available with some creations.
HP cannot fall below configured threshold percentage.
Immune to damage of specified element (Physical + seven elements).
Applies element to entity. Does not decay naturally; consumed by Elemental Reactions.
Enhanced jumping. xz multiplier = horizontal distance; y multiplier = vertical height.
Grants a Shield; parameters from Shield configuration.
Mount a looping effect on the entity.
Immune to taunts in Classic and Custom Aggro modes.
Other players cannot see the character under this effect.
Elemental attacks by creations cannot apply elements.
Set character facing or specified angle as top of mini-map.
Triggers [When Character Movement SPD Meets Condition] event. Query movement speed/direction.
Triggers [When Elemental Reaction Event Occurs] on target entity for specified reaction type.
Restricts normal movement. Does not affect movement during skills. May affect disengagement.
Cannot escape Struggle state early using the Struggle button.
Hitbox not disabled during sprinting (default: briefly disabled).
Hides entity's marker on the mini-map.
When filter TRUE and obscured, displayed with configured color penetrating obstruction.
Edges outlined with configured color. Boolean filter configurable.
When Boolean filter TRUE, entity/creation is not visible.
Semi/fully transparent. Mute effects and audio per settings. Filter controls visibility.
Animations play regardless of visibility or camera view.
Character's scan tag component data takes effect per set parameters.
Tutorial Example: Create a unit status that increases Max HP, stacks up to 5 times, infinite duration. Each stack adds
Max HP Correction Value of 1000. Apply via Skill Node Graph using [Apply Unit Status] when player casts a skill.
